versions.version_description: A folk-oriented version of Material Girl in G with an alternate melody and inclusion of the intro and post-chorus synth riff.
Some repeated sections have been cut out, but the chords are more detailed and are complete.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

content:
Material Girl Chords by Madonna

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]  (repeat several times)

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Some boys kiss me, some boys hug me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
I think they're O.K.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
If they don't give me proper credit[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I just walk away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
They can beg and they can plead[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
But they can't see the light, that's right[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Cause the boy with the cold hard cash[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Is always Mister Right, 'cause we are[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
Living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      
You know that we are[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
And I am a material girl[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Some boys romance, some boys slow dance[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
That's all right with me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
If they can't raise my interest then I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Have to let them be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Some boys try and some boys lie but[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
I don't let them play[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Only boys who save their pennies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Make my rainy day, 'cause they are[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              
Living in a material world [material][/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              
Living in a material world[/tab]
(repeat)

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Boys may come and boys may go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch]
And that's all right you see[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Experience has made me rich[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And now they're after me, 'cause everybody's[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
A material, a material, a material, a material world[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              
Living in a material world [material][/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Living in a material world[/tab]
(repeat and fade)

ANDRETTI  LUC DEVERAUX!
